The dedicated blockchain network for data monetization within AI models

The leading LayerAI ecosystem comprises of a zkRollup Layer-2 blockchain, LayerVPN, KyotoX, LayerMarketplace, and the LayerAI data economy app.
StakingMigration RequestsBuy LayerAI Claim LayerAIMint Data Capsules

Ecosystem Products

078ad1bf896a1214e35b00f478

Layer-2

LayerAI builds its own zero-knowledge layer-2 network on top of Ethereum, using a low-cost, secure, safe, and private zkRollup technology to turn data into a valuable asset.

Layer VPN

Users, upon downloading LayerVPN and having equipped their Data Capsule, are able to earn reward tokens for browsing the web.

Data Economy App

The user's LayerVPN account is paired with their account on the LayerAI Economy App, which functions as a web3 hub of the LayerAI economy.

Roadmap

Q2_2024 - Minerva Upgrade
Testnet Release of LayerAI Layer-2 Network
Q3_2024 - Web3 Browser
BrowseWeb3 Native Browser for Web3
Q3_2024 - Decentralized Perps
Perpetuals Trading on 4 Major Blockchain Networks
Q3_2024 - Feronia Upgrade
Mainnet Release of LayerAI Layer-2 Network
Q4_2024 - Fortuna Upgrade
LAI Asset Optimized as Local Network Gas for Transactions
Q4_2024 - AI2Earn Launch
Layer Marketplace with Integrated LayerAI Developer SDK
Q1_2025 - Vulcan Upgrade
Network-Local Decentralized Data Intelligence Hub

Practical application

High Quality Data Innovates Industries

LayerAI ecosystem establishes data as an emerging asset class to contribute to the global AI economy.
News

Optimizing Logistics with Precision: The Role of High-Quality Data in Al Transformation

The synergy between Artificial Intelligence (Al) and high- quality data has emerged as a pivotal force driving transformative advancements in medicine and biotechnology.
Harnessing the Power of AI and High-Quality Data for Disaster Management and Resilience
AI and high-quality data technologies provide valuable insights, improve efficiency, and enhance our ability to mitigate the impact of disasters. We can better protect lives, property, and livelihoods, making our world more resilient in the face of adversity.
Learn more
AI and High-Quality Data in the Communications Industry
Integration of AI and High-Quality data is driving unprecedented change and opening up new possibilities in multiple fields of the Communications industry.
Learn more
Ensuring a Responsible Technological Future
The synergy of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and high-quality data holds immense promise for driving innovation, enhancing productivity, and improving lives.
Learn more
Empowering Language Models through AI
The symbiotic relationship between AI and high-quality data forms the cornerstone of advancements in language modeling, paving the way for more intelligent, robust, and ethically responsible LLMs that enrich human-computer interaction and drive innovation across various industries.
Learn more

LayerAI - Polygon

LayerAI Builds with the Polygon CDK

LayerAI ZK Layer-2 is utilizing Polygon's CDK as the backend infrastructure to guarantee correct execution, uptime, and scalability of the network.

Building in this way will allow us to rely on a tested ecosystem and drastically lower the time needed to deploy, test, maintain, and release our blockchain.
Technologist Explains
Learn more
Build Advanced Data with Layer AI
Build Advanced Data with Layer AI
Build Advanced Data with Layer AI
Generate an AI Data Capsule
Run
Product Suite

Explore The LayerAI Ecosystem

ZK Layer-2 Network
LayerAI builds its own zero-knowledge layer-2 network on top of Ethereum, using a low-cost, secure, safe, and private zkRollup technology to turn data into a valuable asset.
Learn more
LayerVPN Node
LayerVPN is LayerAI’s native VPN solution that also functions as a data node.

Users, upon downloading LayerVPN and having equipped their Data Capsule, are able to earn reward tokens for browsing the web.

The user's LayerVPN account is paired with their account on the LayerAI Economy App, which functions as a web3 hub of the LayerAI economy.
Learn more
KyotoX DeFi Hub
KyotoX is the DeFi Layer inside LayerAI that functions as a decentralized finance hub. This makes it the go-to financial product for every tokenized AI startup that achieves scale.
Learn more
Trade on KyotoX
Layer Marketplace
Layer Marketplace is the native NFT Marketplace on LayerAI, where users can transact Data Capsule NFTs.

Data Capsules enable earning from contributing data to the ecosystem. As NFTs, Data Capsules are traded on the Layer Marketplace.

Layer Marketplace is the gateway for retail users to earn by browsing. It allows to buy and sell data capsules - that allow to monetize your behavioral data.
Learn more
Data Capsule
Data Capsules are NFTs that allow to monetize your behavioral data. AI Capsules represent your dataset, acquired from your activity browsing on the Internet.

After minting the capsules, you will enter AI2Earn from browsing by offering your data for monetization.
Learn more
Get a Data Capsule
Global Data Marketplace
LayerAI aims to create advanced data assets that can be deployed across multiple AI models at the same time. Within the current state of the market, there exists a market opportunity to create a digital blockchain-based global data marketplace.
Learn more

Advanced Data

Data is set to become an asset class that powers the AI revolution. The increasing demand for high quality data to improve AI models is likely to lead to new companies creating a lot of value in the global data market.

Technology Infrastructure

Polygon Chain Development Kit
Amazon Web Services
Microsoft Azure
Google Cloud Platform
Terraform
GPT Models
DALL-E
Polygon Chain Development Kit (CDK)
Polygon CDK is an open source codebase for launching ZK-powered L2 chains for Ethereum, on demand.

All chains deployed using Polygon CDK are interoperable, with automatic access to the unified liquidity of all Polygon chains, and one-click access to the entire liquidity of EthereumCore modularity means developers can use Polygon CDK to design networks according to their needs Zero-knowledge proofs ensure cryptographic security and near-instant finality.
Amazon Web Services (AWS)
Offers robust cloud computing services which can be used for hosting blockchain nodes, providing scalable and secure cloud infrastructure.
Microsoft Azure
Microsoft Azure is a cloud computing platform run by Microsoft. It offers access, management, and the development of applications and services through global data centers.

Azure offers a variety of services to support the development and deployment of decentralized applications. It’s blockchain offerings emphasize security, scalability, and interoperability, making them suitable for diverse industries and use cases such as supply chain, finance, and healthcare.
Google Cloud Platform
Provides a secure and scalable environment for running blockchain nodes, with AI and machine learning capabilities to enhance blockchain applications.
Terraform
Terraform Cloud is a centralized and collaborative platform for managing infrastructure as code (IaC) deployments. It streamlines the process of defining, provisioning, and managing infrastructure across various cloud providers. It provides a web-based interface that facilitates collaborative work among team members, enabling them to collectively manage infrastructure configurations and deployments. Terraform Cloud offers features such as remote state management, version control, and access controls, enhancing the efficiency and reliability of infrastructure management in a business environment.

This platform ensures consistency in deployments, simplifies collaboration, and enables organizations to scale their infrastructure with ease, making it a valuable tool for businesses seeking efficient and standardized approaches to managing their cloud infrastructure.
GPT (Generative Pretrained Transformer) Models
These advanced language models can be used for natural language processing tasks within blockchain applications, such as smart contract development, user interaction, or automated content generation.
DALL-E by OpenAI
DALL-E is a generative model developed by OpenAI. It is a variation of the GPT-3 (Generative Pre-trained Transformer 3) architecture, designed specifically for image generation.� 

DALL-E is capable of generating images from textual descriptions. Given a textual prompt, it can generate novel and diverse images that match the description.� The model was trained on a diverse range of images and textual descriptions, allowing it to learn to generate creative and novel images based on user input.
